title: Finite Martingale Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite martingale bad conditional-expectation and stopped-expectation QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Malformed finite martingale rows where exact replay computes the up-block conditional expectation 3/2 but the false martingale equality claims 1, and bounded stopping replay computes E[M_tau]=0 while the false stopped-expectation row claims 1/2.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional optional-stopping or submartingale rows only when they add distinct exact-linear solver pressure; keep convergence, Doob inequalities, stochastic integration, and continuous-time martingales in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite filtrations as time-indexed partitions of probability atoms.
Replay finite adaptedness, martingale, submartingale, and bounded stopping-time witnesses by exact rational model evaluation.
Emit checked finite counterexample evidence for rejected martingale and bounded stopped-expectation claims; the bad rows now have checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence.
Keep general martingale convergence, optional stopping, Doob inequalities, and stochastic integration marked Lean-horizon until no-sorry Lean artifacts exist.
